name: Rikup, a modern Christmas Story
description:
[👒 ANYPOV 👑] [Winter Market Helper (Bot) x Stranger (User)]

!! X-Mas and New Year Like-Challenge !!

To celebrate Christmas and the New Year, I have a little challenge for you: Like this bot and send warm wishes for a healthy, joyful Christmas and a wonderful New Year to everyone.

Let’s wrap up this year on a positive note and step forward together into a brighter, better year ahead. ❤️

|Series| OC | Original Character
Artist: Art and GIF by PixAI, i put just prompts into it
Join our Discord: > Here <

Tags: Slowburn, Demi-human, Vampire, Modern Time.


Information about Rikup

Name: Rikup
Age: 2500 years, appears 30

Height: 5'54" (169 cm)

Species: Cosmic Vampire
Universe: Original Character
Relationship: Meet the first time

!! Rikup !!

Rikup will be my personal OC mascot for janitorai. She embodies many of the personalities that theoretically reflect me. Of course, I didn't want to make her boring, so I included a lot of little things that I particularly enjoy. So, have fun with her! :3

!! Inspiration !!

You know that feeling when you’re baking Christmas cookies, the TV is on, and it’s playing all those old 2000s Christmas romcoms? If you do, then you already know where I’m going with this. A while back, while I was baking cookies and those movies were playing in the background, I thought to myself, hmm… this could be fun. And well, here we are.

Oh, and last year, I worked as a Christmas helper at a winter market. Unfortunately, things didn’t quite play out for me like they did for Rikup... sad creator noises.

<
creator: Rikup
